title: Expanding archive files without controlling resource consumption is security sensitive
description: This rule checks if archive files are expanded without controlling resource consumption, which can lead to Denial of Service (DoS) attacks.
message: Expanding archive without controlling resource consumption
recommendation: Use a library that limits the number of extracted files or the size of extracted data.

noncompliant.code:
import zipfile
with zipfile.ZipFile('large_file.zip', 'r') as z:
    z.extractall()
noncompliant.description: Uncontrolled extraction of all files from a large zip file.

compliant.code:
import zipfile
with zipfile.ZipFile('large_file.zip', 'r') as z:
    z.extractall(path='.', num_threads=1)
compliant.description: Limiting the number of threads when extracting large zip file.

why_is_this_an_issue: Uncontrolled resource consumption can lead to Denial of Service (DoS) attacks.
how_to_fix: Implement resource consumption control when expanding archive files.
